CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
Sneha loved balancing accounts and tracking money.
Numbers just make sense to me.
2
But a finance career needed a real degree.
How do I turn this into a job?
3
Then she found a B.Com in Accounting & Finance, online.
My finance career starts here!
4
She enrolled and began mastering the craft.
From curious to qualified!

Why A B.Com In Accounting & Finance

  • 1
    Master the real craft: accounting, taxation, auditing and financial management.
  • 2
    Apply real finance tools and included micro-credentials from your very first semester.
  • 3
    ₹1,35,000 for the full 3-year B.Com (₹45,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
  • 4
    A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ B.Com that employers and CA/CMA paths recognise.

SPECIAL POWER 1

Powered byGoogleMicrosoftIndustry Experts
